// AUTO-GENERATED from pipeline/manifest.py by pipeline.gadget — do not edit by hand.
// Per-series spoiler filter. Each {{spoiler|book=<slug>|...}} renders
// <span class="spoiler-fact" data-book="<slug>">; we hide any fact whose (series, number)
// is beyond the reader's chosen progress for that series.
(function () {
  var DATA = {"books": {"tg-01-house-of-blades": {"series": "travelers-gate", "number": 1}, "tg-02-crimson-vault": {"series": "travelers-gate", "number": 2}, "tg-03-city-of-light": {"series": "travelers-gate", "number": 3}, "ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow": {"series": "elder-empire-sea", "number": 1}, "ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea": {"series": "elder-empire-shadow", "number": 1}, "ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness": {"series": "elder-empire-sea", "number": 2}, "ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn": {"series": "elder-empire-shadow", "number": 2}, "ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers": {"series": "elder-empire-sea", "number": 3}, "ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings": {"series": "elder-empire-shadow", "number": 3}, "cradle-01-unsouled": {"series": "cradle", "number": 1}, "cradle-02-soulsmith": {"series": "cradle", "number": 2}, "cradle-03-blackflame": {"series": "cradle", "number": 3}, "cradle-04-skysworn": {"series": "cradle", "number": 4}, "cradle-05-ghostwater": {"series": "cradle", "number": 5}, "cradle-06-underlord": {"series": "cradle", "number": 6}, "cradle-07-uncrowned": {"series": "cradle", "number": 7}, "cradle-08-wintersteel": {"series": "cradle", "number": 8}, "cradle-09-bloodline": {"series": "cradle", "number": 9}, "cradle-10-reaper": {"series": "cradle", "number": 10}, "cradle-11-dreadgod": {"series": "cradle", "number": 11}, "cradle-12-waybound": {"series": "cradle", "number": 12}, "cradle-13-threshold": {"series": "cradle", "number": 13}, "lh-01-the-captain": {"series": "last-horizon", "number": 1}, "lh-02-the-engineer": {"series": "last-horizon", "number": 2}, "lh-03-the-knight": {"series": "last-horizon", "number": 3}, "lh-04-the-pilot": {"series": "last-horizon", "number": 4}}, "series": ["travelers-gate", "elder-empire-sea", "elder-empire-shadow", "cradle", "last-horizon"], "titles": {"travelers-gate": "The Traveler's Gate Trilogy", "elder-empire-sea": "The Elder Empire: Sea", "elder-empire-shadow": "The Elder Empire: Shadow", "cradle": "Cradle", "last-horizon": "The Last Horizon"}};
  var KEY = "willverseProgress";

  function maxOf(series) {
    var m = 0, slug;
    for (slug in DATA.books) {
      if (DATA.books[slug].series === series && DATA.books[slug].number > m) {
        m = DATA.books[slug].number;
      }
    }
    return m;
  }
  function progress() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(KEY)) || {}; } catch (e) { return {}; }
  }
  function apply() {
    var p = progress();
    document.querySelectorAll(".spoiler-fact").forEach(function (el) {
      var meta = DATA.books[el.getAttribute("data-book")];
      if (!meta) { el.style.display = ""; return; }        // unknown book: never hide
      var read = (meta.series in p) ? p[meta.series] : maxOf(meta.series); // unset = show all
      el.style.display = (meta.number > read) ? "none" : "";
    });
  }
  function buildControls() {
    var p = progress();
    var box = document.createElement("div");
    box.className = "willverse-spoiler-controls";
    // slim brand strip (visuals are CRITICAL — was a bulky gray form box); rules also in
    // MediaWiki:Common.css for anything the inline baseline misses
    box.style.cssText = "border:1px solid #d5d9e2;border-left:4px solid #22304f;border-radius:2px;padding:.3em .7em;margin:.4em 0 1em;background:#fbfbf9;font-size:85%;line-height:2";
    var strong = box.appendChild(document.createElement("strong"));
    strong.textContent = "Spoilers — read up to:";
    strong.style.cssText = "color:#22304f;margin-right:.9em";
    DATA.series.forEach(function (series) {
      var max = maxOf(series), i;
      var label = document.createElement("label");
      label.style.cssText = "display:inline-block;margin:0 .9em 0 0;white-space:nowrap";
      label.appendChild(document.createTextNode((DATA.titles[series] || series) + ": "));
      var sel = document.createElement("select");
      var cur = (series in p) ? p[series] : max;           // default: fully read
      sel.add(new Option("Not started", "0", false, cur === 0));
      for (i = 1; i <= max; i++) sel.add(new Option("Book " + i, String(i), false, cur === i));
      sel.addEventListener("change", function () {
        var q = progress(); q[series] = parseInt(sel.value, 10);
        localStorage.setItem(KEY, JSON.stringify(q)); apply();
      });
      label.appendChild(sel);
      box.appendChild(label);
    });
    var content = document.getElementById("mw-content-text");
    if (content && content.parentNode) content.parentNode.insertBefore(box, content);
  }
  function init() { buildControls(); apply(); }
  if (document.readyState !== "loading") init();
  else document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
})();
